---
name: "🆕 Feature request"
about: Suggest a new feature for the card
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### Describe the feature
Clear and concise description of the new feature you want to add.

### Why is it useful?
Explain the value of this feature.

### Additional context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples related to your request.

### Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues (including closed ones).
- [ ] This request is not a duplicate.
